title: Another Fragment: To Music.
content:
No, Music, thou art not the 'food of Love.'
    Unless Love feeds upon its own sweet self,
    Till it becomes all Music murmurs of.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Percy Bysshe Shelley, titled "Another Fragment: To Music.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
